what_it_does: A method note (2026-06-08, framed as Tim's steer) describing a three-layer architecture-visibility research process — cheap coverage/inventory fan-out, smart targeted deep-reads keyed off the inventory, and an Opus synthesis with a completeness critic — plus a coverage guarantee, the five-agent Layer-1 partition (INV-A..INV-E), and current status.
observations: States the goal: make the whole application architecture visible/understandable so Claude Design and any agent can design into it and integrate cleanly.
Quotes Tim's caution that much was built from many angles (6 branches + worktree + vault) and 'don't underestimate the research.'

Defines three layers: LAYER 1 coverage/inventory (cheap, Haiku, broad parallel), LAYER 2 deep read (Sonnet/Opus, targeted off Layer 1), LAYER 3 synthesis (Opus) plus a completeness critic with a top-up loop.
Names the deliverables: research/inventory/<region>.md, research/deep/<cluster>.md, and the keystone APPLICATION-STRUCTURE-PACK.md at full scope.
Distinguishes this full sweep from a prior Wave 1 5-agent sampler.
Specifies a coverage guarantee: Layer 1 maps every dir across all angles; Layer 2 must cover every PRIORITY-flagged place; Layer 3 critic loops-until-dry on coverage.

Gives the explicit Layer-1 partition mapping the five INV agents (A=runtime/store/fabric/contracts/root, B=canvas/design/panels, C=nodes/roles/mcp_face/voice, D=tests/docs/ops/self-description, E=the angles).
Status: Layer 1 launched 2026-06-08 with Haiku x5; Layer 2 dispatches after inventory review; the studio scaffold runs in parallel as the proving slice.
standouts: The cheap->smart->synthesis layering with cost-tiered model assignment (Haiku for breadth, Sonnet/Opus for depth, Opus for synthesis).
The completeness-critic + loop-until-dry coverage discipline so no angle is missed.
The explicit separation of 'location' (Layer 1) from 'comprehension' (Layer 2) — inventory is WHERE, not what.
Parallel proving: the studio scaffold proves the pack's USE while the research produces the pack's INPUT.
conventions: Encodes the loop-prep / research-wave methodology of cheap-broad-coverage then strong-final-synthesis.
Uses a fenced ASCII diagram to lay out the three layers.
Ties each layer to a concrete output path, following the repo's artifact-addressing habit.
notes: The method spec behind this research dir: a three-layer (inventory -> deep-read -> synthesis+critic) architecture-visibility sweep across all 6 branches + worktree + vault, with the INV-A..E agent partition.
questions: Did the keystone APPLICATION-STRUCTURE-PACK.md get produced, and did the completeness critic run to dry?
Were all PRIORITY-flagged places from Layer 1 actually covered in Layer 2?
Which model tiers were ultimately used for Layers 2 and 3 in practice?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it is a method/plan note and it lays out the method, partition, coverage guarantee, and status without claiming the work is complete.
apparent_themes: Layered cheap-to-smart research (coverage then comprehension then synthesis)
Architecture made visible/understandable as the deliverable
Proving by parallel use (the studio slice)
intention_signals: Intends to make a large, multi-angle codebase fully legible to design agents by a disciplined layered sweep that guarantees coverage before synthesis, avoiding the under-research Tim warned against.
novelty: The explicit three-tier model-cost layering paired with a per-angle coverage guarantee and a loop-until-dry completeness critic feeding one keystone pack.
contribution: Contributes the methodology and agent partition for the claude-design research wave — the layer definitions, the INV-A..E division of the tree across all angles, the coverage guarantee, and the named keystone output.
summary_for_embedding: A method note defining a three-layer (cheap inventory, smart deep-read, Opus synthesis+critic) architecture-visibility research sweep across all branches/worktree/vault, with a five-agent INV-A..E Layer-1 partition and a coverage guarantee.
intention_for_embedding: To make the whole Company architecture visible to design agents via a disciplined, coverage-guaranteed layered research process producing one keystone structure pack.
